name: Bon Bon Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 packages Nestles Bon Bon Ice Cream Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the bottom of a 9-inch chocolate cookie crust with 1 1/4 boxes of Nestles Bon Bon Ice Cream Nuggets.
2. Mix instant vanilla pudding mix with milk, green food coloring, and peppermint extract. Spoon over the Bon Bons.
3. Freeze for 5 hours. Decorate with melted chocolate, whipping topping, and more Bon Bon nuggets. Enjoy!!
